[[/8. c4|8. c4 - only move]]|=}} Both of White's developed pieces are threatened with capture, so [[Chess Opening Theory/1. e4/1...e5/2. Nf3/2...Nc6/3. Bb5/3...f5/4. Nc3/4...fxe4/5. Nxe4/5...d5/6.
